Let me write a Python script to add the self-locking Motor contact to the XML file. ## Action: Type a Python heredoc script to read the XML, check for missing elements, and add the self-locking Motor contact and right power rail if needed. ## Code: ```python pyautogui.typewrite("""python3 << 'PYEOF' import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET ns = 'http://www.plcopen.org/xml/tc6_0201' ET.register_namespace('', ns) tree = ET.parse('/home/user/Desktop/output/Case1_Motor/plc.xml') root = tree.getroot() # Find the LD element ld = root.find('.//{%s}LD' % ns) if ld is not None: # Check if right power rail exists (localId="5") has_rpr = False has_contact6 = False for child in ld: if child.get('localId') == '5': has_rpr = True if child.get('localId') == '6': has_contact6 = True # Add right power rail if missing if not has_rpr: rpr = ET.Element('{%s}rightPowerRail' % ns, {'localId': '5', 'width': '10', 'height': '40'}) ET.SubElement(rpr, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '510', 'y': '80'}) cp_in = ET.SubElement(rpr, '{%s}connectionPointIn' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_in, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '0', 'y': '20'}) ld.append(rpr) print('Right power rail added') # Add self-locking Motor contact if missing if not has_contact6: contact = ET.Element('{%s}contact' % ns, {'localId': '6', 'negated': 'false', 'width': '21', 'height': '20'}) ET.SubElement(contact, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '180', 'y': '60'}) cp_in = ET.SubElement(contact, '{%s}connectionPointIn' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_in, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '0', 'y': '10'}) cp_out = ET.SubElement(contact, '{%s}connectionPointOut' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_out, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '21', 'y': '10'}) var = ET.SubElement(contact, '{%s}variable' % ns) var.text = 'Motor' ld.append(contact) print('Self-locking Motor contact added') if has_rpr and has_contact6: print('All elements already present') tree.write('/home/user/Desktop/output/Case1_Motor/plc.xml', encoding='utf-8', xml_declaration=True) print('XML file saved successfully') else: print('ERROR: LD element not found') PYEOF""", interval=0.01) ```

Let me write a Python script to add all the required elements at once: left power rail, Start_PB contact, Stop_PB contact (negated), Motor coil, right power rail, and self-locking Motor contact. ## Action: Type a Python heredoc script to add all required LD elements to the plc.xml file. ## Code: ```python pyautogui.typewrite("""python3 << 'PYEOF' import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET ns = 'http://www.plcopen.org/xml/tc6_0201' ET.register_namespace('', ns) tree = ET.parse('/home/user/Desktop/output/Case1_Motor/plc.xml') root = tree.getroot() ld = root.find('.//{%s}LD' % ns) if ld is not None: # Clear existing elements for child in list(ld): ld.remove(child) # Add left power rail rpr = ET.Element('{%s}leftPowerRail' % ns, {'localId': '1', 'width': '10', 'height': '40'}) pos = ET.SubElement(rpr, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '60', 'y': '80'}) cp_out = ET.SubElement(rpr, '{%s}connectionPointOut' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_out, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '10', 'y': '20'}) ld.append(rpr) # Add Start_PB contact contact1 = ET.Element('{%s}contact' % ns, {'localId': '2', 'negated': 'false', 'width': '21', 'height': '20'}) ET.SubElement(contact1, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '180', 'y': '100'}) cp_in = ET.SubElement(contact1, '{%s}connectionPointIn' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_in, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '0', 'y': '10'}) cp_out = ET.SubElement(contact1, '{%s}connectionPointOut' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_out, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '21', 'y': '10'}) ET.SubElement(contact1, '{%s}variable' % ns).text = 'Start_PB' ld.append(contact1) # Add Stop_PB contact (negated) contact2 = ET.Element('{%s}contact' % ns, {'localId': '3', 'negated': 'true', 'width': '20', 'height': '20'}) ET.SubElement(contact2, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '290', 'y': '100'}) cp_in = ET.SubElement(contact2, '{%s}connectionPointIn' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_in, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '0', 'y': '10'}) cp_out = ET.SubElement(contact2, '{%s}connectionPointOut' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_out, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '20', 'y': '10'}) ET.SubElement(contact2, '{%s}variable' % ns).text = 'Stop_PB' ld.append(contact2) # Add Motor coil coil = ET.Element('{%s}coil' % ns, {'localId': '4', 'negated': 'false', 'width': '21', 'height': '20'}) ET.SubElement(coil, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '400', 'y': '110'}) cp_in = ET.SubElement(coil, '{%s}connectionPointIn' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_in, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '0', 'y': '10'}) cp_out = ET.SubElement(coil, '{%s}connectionPointOut' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_out, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '21', 'y': '10'}) ET.SubElement(coil, '{%s}variable' % ns).text = 'Motor' ld.append(coil) # Add right power rail rpr2 = ET.Element('{%s}rightPowerRail' % ns, {'localId': '5', 'width': '10', 'height': '40'}) ET.SubElement(rpr2, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '510', 'y': '80'}) cp_in = ET.SubElement(rpr2, '{%s}connectionPointIn' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_in, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '0', 'y': '20'}) ld.append(rpr2) # Add self-locking Motor contact (parallel with Start_PB) contact3 = ET.Element('{%s}contact' % ns, {'localId': '6', 'negated': 'false', 'width': '21', 'height': '20'}) ET.SubElement(contact3, '{%s}position' % ns, {'x': '180', 'y': '60'}) cp_in = ET.SubElement(contact3, '{%s}connectionPointIn' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_in, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '0', 'y': '10'}) cp_out = ET.SubElement(contact3, '{%s}connectionPointOut' % ns) ET.SubElement(cp_out, '{%s}relPosition' % ns, {'x': '21', 'y': '10'}) ET.SubElement(contact3, '{%s}variable' % ns).text = 'Motor' ld.append(contact3) tree.write('/home/user/Desktop/output/Case1_Motor/plc.xml', encoding='utf-8', xml_declaration=True) print('All LD elements added successfully!') else: print('ERROR: LD element not found') PYEOF """, interval=0.01) ```
